# PDF Tools

A comprehensive PDF manipulation tool suite built with Next.js 15 and React 19.

## Features

- **PDF Conversion**: Word, Excel, PPT, HTML, Images ↔ PDF
- **PDF Manipulation**: Merge, Split, Compress, Rotate, Organize, Resize
- **PDF Security**: Protect, Unlock, Redact, Flatten, Watermark
- **AI Chat**: Ask questions about your PDF documents
- **OCR**: Extract text from scanned PDFs using Tesseract.js

## Tools

### Analyze
- [Bank Statement Analyzer](/bank-statement-analyzer)
- [Compare PDF](/compare-pdf)
- [Invoice Extractor](/invoice-extractor)
- [Legal Comparison](/legal-comparison)
- [OCR PDF](/ocr-pdf)
- [PDF Metadata](/pdf-metadata)

### Convert
- [PDF to Word](/pdf-to-word)
- [Word to PDF](/word-to-pdf)
- [PDF to Excel](/pdf-to-excel)
- [Excel to PDF](/excel-to-pdf)
- [PDF to PPT](/pdf-to-ppt)
- [PPT to PDF](/ppt-to-pdf)
- [PDF to Image (JPG/PNG/WebP)](/pdf-to-jpg)
- [Image to PDF](/jpg-to-pdf)
- [HTML to PDF](/html-to-pdf)

### Edit
- [Edit PDF](/edit-pdf)
- [Page Numbers](/page-numbers)
- [Redact PDF](/redact-pdf)
- [Rotate PDF](/rotate-pdf)
- [Sign PDF](/sign-pdf)
- [Watermark PDF](/watermark-pdf)

### Optimize
- [Compress PDF](/compress-pdf)
- [Flatten PDF](/flatten-pdf)
- [Grayscale PDF](/grayscale-pdf)
- [Repair PDF](/repair-pdf)
- [Resize PDF](/resize-pdf)

### Organize
- [Merge PDF](/merge-pdf)
- [Split PDF](/split-pdf)
- [Organize PDF](/organize-pdf)
- [Extract Pages](/extract-pages)
- [Remove Pages](/remove-pages)

### Security
- [Protect PDF](/protect-pdf)
- [Unlock PDF](/unlock-pdf)
